findings.evidence: Current grep shows only `TauCeti/FieldTheory/Trace.lean:109:theorem trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast`; no `trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast_of_not_mem_range` or deprecation alias appears in `TauCeti/FieldTheory/Trace.lean`, while the diff shows the old public theorem name being removed.
findings.fix: Add a `@[deprecated TauCeti.NumberField.trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast (since := "2026-06-20")]` theorem with the old name and same signature, forwarding to the new theorem.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.NumberField.trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast_of_not_mem_range` was a public theorem in the pre-PR diff and is replaced by `trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast`, breaking downstream users of the old name.

summary: The PR silently removes a public NumberField theorem name instead of leaving the required deprecated alias.
